metadata.title: Senichka
metadata.description: Unique handmade jewelry crafted with love using ethically sourced materials.

contactPage.metaTitle: Contact Us — We'd Love to Hear From You
contactPage.metaDescription: Have a question about our handmade jewelry? Send us a message and we'll get back to you within 1–2 business days.
contactPage.heroSubtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Fill out the form and we'll reply within 1–2 business days.
contactPage.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 1–2 business days.
contactPage.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contactPage.validationEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
contactPage.validationMessageTooShort: Message must be at least 10 characters.

aboutPage.metaTitle: About Us — Handmade Jewelry with Heart
aboutPage.metaDescription: Meet the maker behind our handcrafted jewelry. Learn how each piece is made by hand using ethically sourced sterling silver and natural gemstones.
aboutPage.heroTitle: Made by hand, worn with heart
aboutPage.heroSubtitle: Each piece is crafted one at a time — never mass-produced, never rushed.
aboutPage.storyParagraph1: It started with a passion for creating something real. Not perfect, but real — made by hand, with intention, and with care for the person who would one day wear it.
aboutPage.storyParagraph2: Every ring, necklace, and bracelet in our collection is handmade in a small studio. No factories, no assembly lines. Just time, skill, and a commitment to craft.
aboutPage.processStep1Description: Every piece starts as a sketch — inspired by nature, geometry, and the beauty of imperfection.
aboutPage.processStep2Description: Sterling silver is cut, shaped, and soldered by hand using traditional jeweler's tools.
aboutPage.processStep3Description: Natural gemstones are set one by one — each chosen for its unique color and character.
aboutPage.processStep4Description: Each piece is polished, inspected, and carefully packaged for its new home.
aboutPage.materialsSilverDescription: We use .925 sterling silver for durability and a beautiful finish that lasts for years.
aboutPage.materialsGemstonesDescription: From moonstone to labradorite, our stones are ethically sourced and selected by hand.
aboutPage.materialsFinishDescription: All orders ship in recycled kraft boxes with seed paper cards you can plant.
aboutPage.valuesCraftDescription: Quality over quantity — always. We take the time each piece deserves.
aboutPage.valuesSustainabilityDescription: Ethically sourced materials, minimal waste, and packaging that gives back to the earth.
aboutPage.valuesConnectionDescription: Jewelry is personal. We want every customer to feel that when they open the box.
aboutPage.imageAlt: Handcrafted jewelry being made in a small studio

header.cartItemCount: {count, plural, =0 {Shopping cart} one {Shopping cart — # item} other {Shopping cart — # items}}

cookieBanner.title: We use cookies
cookieBanner.description: We use strictly necessary cookies to keep the site working and optional cookies for analytics and marketing. You can accept all, reject optional cookies, or customise your preferences.
cookieBanner.analyticsDescription: Help us understand how visitors use the site (Google Analytics, PostHog, Microsoft Clarity). Activated only with your consent.
cookieBanner.marketingDescription: Used for advertising and remarketing (Facebook Pixel, Google Ads). Activated only with your consent.
cookieBanner.necessaryDescription: Required for the site to work: shopping cart, login session, security. Cannot be disabled.
